reason: Verify all new v5 rules use design tokens (no raw px outside the scale), live inside @media (max-width: 768px), and don't mutate desktop rules.
Verify version bump 2.3.0 -> 2.4.0, light + dark mode parity, prefers-reduced-motion respected, 44pt minimum tap targets.
Prefer extending existing IDs/classes (.m-pills, #mobileTabBar, #dashboardModal, .card, .ios-form-row) over inventing parallel structures.
